description: Group SEND→PERSIST (hermetic, single-instance): create an NGC group, send one text into it via l3_send_group_text (FfiChatService.sendGroupText), and prove the self-send PERSISTS to the group's LOCAL history. A creator sending into its OWN group appends synchronously to history (isSelf=true, keyed by the bare gid) when connected — no second peer needed. The runner reads the group history by overriding conv='group_{{gid}}' (the l3_dump_state group-history readout). leave_group WIPES group history (quitGroup -> clearGroupHistory), so the assertion runs on the LIVE group and the leave is deferred to teardown (which also runs on failure, so no dangling group leaks into knownGroups). Maps to the single-instance data-half of S34 (group send/persist).
